svg.title: Recursive Harness — knockout
svg.desc: One-colour knockout of the core-sample mark: the seven ragged bars reduced to a single ink. Depth colour is sacrificed for single-ink reproduction; the stepped bars and the ragged right edge still read as the core. Recolour with the CSS color property on the svg — paper-and-ink: ink (#1C1005) on light, bone (#E3DDD4) on dark. Oxide never enters the knockout. Radius 0.
